what_it_does: Defines an inline SVG at-sign icon using stroked vector shapes with no fill.
observations: Sets fill to none and stroke to currentColor.
Uses stroke-width 1.5 with round line caps and joins.
Draws the icon with one circle and one path element.
standouts: The icon inherits color from surrounding text or CSS via currentColor.
The at-sign shape is built from minimal geometric primitives.
conventions: Uses rounded stroke terminals and joins.
notes: This file is a compact stroke-based SVG asset for an at-sign icon.
purpose_vs_actual: The filename and content align: it is an at-sign SVG icon.
intention_signals: It appears intended to provide a reusable, styleable at-sign icon for an interface or design system.
contribution: Contributes a compact, color-inheriting at-sign icon asset with consistent stroke styling for use in a fused design system.
summary_for_embedding: A 24x24 stroke-only SVG at-sign icon made from a circle and path using currentColor.
intention_for_embedding: This file was for supplying a reusable at-sign icon asset that adapts to surrounding color styles.
